'''Wyloff''' was a terrestrial astronomical object located in the [[Wyloff system/Legends|Wyloff system]], a part of the [[Wyloff sector/Legends|Wyloff sector]]<ref name="CRO" /> in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of Wyloff was surrounded by middle class suburbs. Wyloff was also the location of the [[Wyloff sector Imperial Intelligence ExComm facility]].<ref name="CRO" />

Wyloff was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Ilo Jev/Legends|Ilo Jev]], who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] approximately [[36 BBY/Legends|thirty-six years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Jev grew up in the suburbs of Wyloff's capital, and [[Ilo Jev's father|his father]] was a prominent local broadcast personality whose career spanned several [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Jev eventually became an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[External Communications]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] with the rank of [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] who was [[Commanding officer/Legends|in charge]] of the Wyloff [[Sector/Legends|sector]] ExComm facility.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wyloff was created by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Wyloff [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Wyloff, in grid square L-8.<ref name="TEA" />
